EVERY JOB STARTS
WITH A WALK-THROUGH.
NOT A GUESS.

Before any crew sets foot on your property, a PW Paint superintendent walks the site with you. We document existing surface conditions, map masking and containment requirements, and confirm product selections in writing.

That walk-through protects you from scope creep, change orders, and the kind of surprises that come from contractors who skip the prep conversation and start painting on day one.

  • Written scope confirmed before scheduling begins
  • Surface condition documented with photos before any prep work
  • Containment and access plan reviewed with your team
  • Product and sheen selections locked in before first coat
Schedule a Walk-Through

What We Do

PAINTING FOR EVERY PROPERTY TYPE

Three core services, all performed by direct W-2 employees. No subcontractors on any job.

01

COMMERCIAL PAINTING

Office buildings, retail centers, warehouses, and multi-unit properties. We manage large-scale projects with direct employee crews and scheduling built around your operations.

Learn More
02

SCHOOL & EDUCATIONAL FACILITIES

Low-VOC compliant products, work scheduled around academic calendars, and zero disruption to students and staff. We carry all required certifications for public and private campus work.

Learn More
03

PARKING LOT STRIPING

ADA-compliant layout, thermoplastic and traffic paint options, new installs and full repaints. We work nights and weekends to keep your lot in operation throughout the project.

Learn More

BUILT ON STANDARDS.
BACKED IN WRITING.

Four commitments we make on every job - not talking points, but terms you can hold us to.

5-YEAR WARRANTY

Every project is backed by a written 5-year warranty covering all labor and Sherwin-Williams materials. No exceptions, no fine print exclusions on workmanship.

COMPETITIVE PRICING

Transparent line-item estimates. No hidden fees, no change-order surprises. The number we quote is the number on your final invoice.

SHERWIN-WILLIAMS PAINT

We use Sherwin-Williams Duration and Emerald product lines on every job. No off-brand substitutions without your written approval.

NO SUBCONTRACTORS

Every painter on your project is a direct W-2 employee of PW Paint. You get a consistent crew, consistent quality, and clear accountability on every job.

About PW Paint

BUILT BY PAINTERS.
RUN FOR RESULTS.

PW Paint was founded in 2013 by a crew of working painters who spent years watching commercial jobs go wrong from rushed prep and cheap materials. We built the company on a single standard: do the prep right, use the right products, and stand behind the work in writing.

Today we serve general contractors, property management firms, HOAs, restaurant groups, and retail brands across Los Angeles, South Bay & Orange County.

  • W-2 employees on every project, zero subcontractors
  • Written 5-year warranty on all labor and materials
  • Sherwin-Williams Duration and Emerald product lines only
  • Direct superintendent contact from start to final walkthrough
Get a Free Quote

COMMON QUESTIONS

Answers to what most clients ask before booking their first project with us.

We cover Los Angeles County, Orange County, and San Diego County. For projects in the Inland Empire or Ventura County, contact us directly and we'll assess based on project scale and timing.

Most commercial projects book 2 to 3 weeks out. For urgent or time-sensitive work, call us directly at (619) 847-3920 and we'll assess availability for your timeline.

Yes. Most of our commercial work happens in active office buildings, retail centers, and occupied residential complexes. We coordinate schedules around your operations, contain work areas with proper barriers, and do a full cleanup at the end of every workday.

We use Sherwin-Williams exclusively - specifically the Duration and Emerald lines for most applications. We do not substitute generic or off-brand products without your written approval. Every estimate includes the specific product line and sheen we recommend for your surface type.

Our written warranty covers all labor and Sherwin-Williams materials for 5 years from project completion. Covered defects include peeling, bubbling, adhesion failure, and color shift from product defect. Normal wear, surface damage, or moisture intrusion from unrelated building issues are not covered.
